structured.name: Use a reserved EVSE
structured.description:
This use cases covers how a reserved EVSE can be used based on IdToken and
GroupIdToken information.
scenario: 1. The EV Driver connects the cable.

2. Charging Station starts a transaction, but EVSE connector status remains
Reserved.

3. The EV Driver presents an IdTokenType at the Charging Station that is the
same as the reservation’s IdTokenType
4. Charging Station matches IdTokenType with the reservation

5. Connector status becomes Occupied, since reservation has now been
consumed

6. Charging Station optionally authorizes the IdTokenType via an
AuthorizeRequest

7. If authorization accepted, or authorization step was skipped:
a. Charging Station starts a transaction as in E02 - Start Transaction -
Cable Plugin First
structured.prerequisites: EVSE has been reserved for IdToken and connector status is Reserved.

requirements.precondition:
Reservation is pending for a specific
idToken for a specific evseId
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on that
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation.

requirements.precondition:
Reservation is pending for a specific
idToken for a specific connectorType
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on an
EVSE with a connector of type connectorType when
IdToken presented for authorization matches the
specific idToken from the reservation.

requirements.precondition:
Reservation is pending for a specific
idToken without a specific evseId or
connectorType
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on an
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation.

requirements.precondition:
H03.FR.01 AND
attribute groupIdToken in reservation
has a value
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on that
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation
or when the associated groupIdToken matches.

requirements.precondition:
H03.FR.02 AND
attribute groupIdToken in reservation
has a value
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on an
EVSE with a connector of type connectorType when
IdToken presented for authorization matches the
specific idToken from the reservation or when the
associated groupIdToken matches.

requirements.precondition:
H03.FR.03 AND
attribute groupIdToken in reservation
has a value
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on any
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation
or when the associated groupIdToken matches.

requirements.precondition:
If attribute groupIdToken in the
reservation has a value (it is optional).
requirements.definition:
In order to determine the groupIdToken that is
associated with an incoming IdToken, the Charging
Station MAY look it up in its Local Authorization
List or Authorization Cache.

requirements.precondition:
H03.FR.07 AND
If the incoming IdToken is not found in
the Local Authorization List or
Authorization Cache.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send an
AuthorizeRequest for the incoming IdToken to the
CSMS in order to get its associated groupIdToken.
(Note: This AuthorizeRequest may already have
been performed when the idToken was presented
for authorization.)

requirements.precondition:
When an idToken or groupIdToken is
presented that matches a reservation
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHALL consider the reservation to
be used (consumed)

requirements.precondition:
H03.FR.09 AND
Connector associated with reservation
has status Reserved
requirements.definition:
Charging Station SHALL set connector status to
Available if no cable has been plugged-in, or
Occupied if a cable has already been plugged-in.

sub_scenarios.objective: Use an EVSE with connector status Reserved, that is reserved for this GroupIdToken
steps: 1. The EV Driver connects the cable.

2. Charging Station starts a transaction, but connector status remains
Reserved.

3. The EV Driver presents an IdTokenType at the Charging Station that is not the
same as the reservation’s IdTokenType, but the reservation contains a
groupIdToken.

4. Charging Station authorizes the IdTokenType via an AuthorizeRequest, Local
Authorization List or Authorization Cache, and checks if the groupIdToken of
the IdTokenType matches with the reservation.

5. If groupIdTokens match:
a. Connector status becomes Occupied, since reservation has now been
consumed.
b. Charging Station starts a transaction as in E02 - Start Transaction -
Cable Plugin First

sub_scenarios.objective:
Use an EVSE when Charging Station has a reservation for idToken, but connector
status is Available.
This happens when reservation is for an unspecified EVSE and multiple EVSEs are
available.
steps: 1. The EV Driver connects the cable
2. Charging Station reports connector status as Occupied

4. The EV Driver presents an IdTokenType at the Charging Station that is the
same as the reservation’s IdTokenType
5. Charging Station matches IdTokenType with the reservation

6. Charging Station optionally authorizes the IdTokenType via an
AuthorizeRequest

7. If authorization accepted, or authorization step was skipped:
a. Charging Station starts a transaction as in E02 - Start Transaction -
Cable Plugin First
sub_scenarios.prerequisites:
Unspecified EVSE has been reserved for idToken. EVSE connector status is
Available.

chunks.content:
# H03 - Use a reserved EVSE

**Objective:** Use a reserved EVSE

**Description:** This use cases covers how a reserved EVSE can be used based on IdToken and
GroupIdToken information.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS, EV Driver

**Scenario:**
TxStartPoint = "EVConnected"; Cable plugged in first
1. The EV Driver connects the cable.
2. Charging Station starts a transaction, but EVSE connector status remains
Reserved.
3. The EV Driver presents an IdTokenType at the Charging Station that is the
same as the reservation’s IdTokenType
4. Charging Station matches IdTokenType with the reservation
5. Connector status becomes Occupied, since reservation has now been
consumed
6. Charging Station optionally authorizes the IdTokenType via an
AuthorizeRequest
7. If authorization accepted, or authorization step was skipped:
a. Charging Station starts a transaction as in E02 - Start Transaction -
Cable Plugin First

**Prerequisites:** EVSE has been reserved for IdToken and connector status is Reserved.

# H03 - Requirements

**H03.FR.01**
Precondition: Reservation is pending for a specific
idToken for a specific evseId
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on that
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation.

**H03.FR.02**
Precondition: Reservation is pending for a specific
idToken for a specific connectorType
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on an
EVSE with a connector of type connectorType when
IdToken presented for authorization matches the
specific idToken from the reservation.

**H03.FR.03**
Precondition: Reservation is pending for a specific
idToken without a specific evseId or
connectorType
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on an
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation.

**H03.FR.04**
Precondition: H03.FR.01 AND
attribute groupIdToken in reservation
has a value
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on that
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation
or when the associated groupIdToken matches.

**H03.FR.05**
Precondition: H03.FR.02 AND
attribute groupIdToken in reservation
has a value
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on an
EVSE with a connector of type connectorType when
IdToken presented for authorization matches the
specific idToken from the reservation or when the
associated groupIdToken matches.

**H03.FR.06**
Precondition: H03.FR.03 AND
attribute groupIdToken in reservation
has a value
The Charging Station SHALL allow charging on any
EVSE when IdToken presented for authorization
matches the specific idToken from the reservation
or when the associated groupIdToken matches.

**H03.FR.07**
Precondition: If attribute groupIdToken in the
reservation has a value (it is optional).
In order to determine the groupIdToken that is
associated with an incoming IdToken, the Charging
Station MAY look it up in its Local Authorization
List or Authorization Cache.

**H03.FR.08**
Precondition: H03.FR.07 AND
If the incoming IdToken is not found in
the Local Authorization List or
Authorization Cache.
The Charging Station SHALL send an
AuthorizeRequest for the incoming IdToken to the
CSMS in order to get its associated groupIdToken.
(Note: This AuthorizeRequest may already have
been performed when the idToken was presented
for authorization.)

**H03.FR.09**
Precondition: When an idToken or groupIdToken is
presented that matches a reservation
Charging Station SHALL consider the reservation to
be used (consumed)

**H03.FR.10**
Precondition: H03.FR.09 AND
Connector associated with reservation
has status Reserved
Charging Station SHALL set connector status to
Available if no cable has been plugged-in, or
Occupied if a cable has already been plugged-in.
